judgment.summary: Applovin Corporation demonstrates exceptional growth and profitability, supported by strong analyst sentiment and a solid cash position, despite a high valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported quarter (ending 2026-03-31), EPS was $3.56, beating the estimate of $3.44 by 3.4%. Next earnings date is 2026-08-05.
positives: Revenue growth of 59.0% and earnings growth of 113.1% indicate robust top-line and bottom-line expansion.
Exceptional profit margin of 64.3% and return on equity of 266.4% highlight strong operational efficiency and profitability.
Free cash flow of $3.18B (TTM) demonstrates significant cash generation capabilities.
Analyst consensus is a strong buy with a mean target price of $644.47, suggesting upside potential.
Current ratio of 3.24 and quick ratio of 3.16 indicate excellent short-term liquidity.
negatives: Forward P/E of 21.75 vs trailing P/E of 41.40 suggests that current valuation is priced for substantial future growth.
PEG ratio of 1.36 indicates the stock may be trading at a premium relative to its expected earnings growth.
Price/Book of 67.86 and Price/Sales of 25.99 are high, suggesting a rich valuation.
Debt/Equity ratio of 162.89 is elevated, indicating significant leverage.
Beta of 2.37 suggests higher volatility compared to the broader market.

news.paragraph: App-related news is varied, with headlines discussing a new app to lower grocery bills, Google's Gemini app update, and X pitching advertisers on app opportunities. Notably, Fortnite has returned to the Apple App Store worldwide, potentially impacting Apple's ongoing App Store fight. Other news includes app distribution partnerships in Europe and various new app launches for health, goal tracking, and toxin scanning.

headlines.title: Lower your grocery bill by using this app to find food discounts
Google updates its Gemini app to take on ChatGPT and Claude at IO 2026
Apple Faces Renewed App Store Fight as Fortnite Returns
X pitches advertisers on rising opportunities in the app
Digital Turbine, Orange Collaborate on App Distribution in Europe
Digital Turbine and Orange Partner to Redefine App Distribution in Europe
Kin Health raises $9M for patient-side AI notetaker app
‘Survivor’ stars Kyle Fraser and Kamilla Karthigesu introduce  a goal-tracking app, Paprclip
Fortnite returns to Apple App Store worldwide amid Supreme Court fight
First App That Scans Everyday Clothing for PFAS, Microplastics and Hidden Toxins Helps Shoppers Find Safer Alternatives
